education.degree: Bachelor of Arts in Theater Arts

experience.title: Production Manager
responsibilities: Managed all aspects of theatrical productions, from planning to execution.
Oversaw scheduling and logistics for performances and rehearsals.
Collaborated with designers and directors to ensure creative visions were realized.
Trained and mentored junior staff and volunteers in production techniques.

experience.title: Event Coordinator
responsibilities: Coordinated logistics for corporate and private events, ensuring client satisfaction.
Managed vendor relationships and negotiated contracts for services.
Developed and implemented event themes, budgets, and timelines.

response.summary: Dynamic and creative professional with extensive experience in production management and event planning, seeking to transition into a new field. Proven ability to lead teams and manage complex projects, with a focus on achieving client satisfaction and creative excellence.
